text: Bitcoin and Ethereum are both down roughly 2% over the past day, while smaller-cap assets like Solana and BNB are falling harder, suggesting weak risk appetite across the board. The Fear & Greed index at 15 signals extreme fear, though the modest 3-point rise over a week hints at shallow bounce attempts rather than capitulation. Bitcoin's dominance at 55.9% and $83B in daily volume indicate traders are rotating into perceived safe havens rather than exiting crypto entirely.
